expectations.text: Rev-share DEWA (A-1203) debits Landlord Receivable — Utilities (120060)
Rev-share plumbing R&M (FixIt) debits Landlord Receivable — R&M (120059)
Turnover cleaning (SparkleClean) is Silkhaus-borne to Unit Cleaning Expenses (620013)
Leased-unit DEWA (L-0907) is Silkhaus-borne to DEWA Consumption (640004)
Emicool cooling on a rev-share unit also debits Landlord Receivable — Utilities (120060)
Splits 5% Input VAT to VAT on Purchases (110038)
Every entry balances and the totals block foots to 3,983.00
Uses only real Silkhaus GL codes (no invented placeholder accounts like 'Due from Owner')
